_comment: Easy Lazy Morning — Agent Configuration. Edit these values to match your actual targets.

agent.name: Easy Lazy Morning
agent._schedule_note: VPN auto-connects at 10:00 AM, agent runs at 10:15 AM with 15-min buffer

kpi_thresholds._logic: Two independent checks run for every metric. Both must pass for Green. Failing either triggers Yellow or Red.

check_1_vs_splm.label: vs Same Period Last Month
check_1_vs_splm.description: MTD actual this month vs MTD actual same calendar period last month
check_1_vs_splm.yellow: splm_gap_pct between -5 and 0  (slightly below SPLM, watch closely)
check_1_vs_splm.red: splm_gap_pct < -5  (more than 5% below same period last month)

check_2_monthly_on_track.label: Monthly KPI On-Track
check_2_monthly_on_track.description: Is the current MTD run-rate sufficient to hit the monthly KPI target by month-end?
check_2_monthly_on_track.yellow: on_track_pct between 85 and 95  (at risk, monitor daily)
check_2_monthly_on_track.red: on_track_pct < 85  (will miss monthly KPI at current pace)

combined_status_logic.yellow: Either check is Yellow (and neither is Red)

annual_targets._note: Monthly targets are derived from the MKT plan Google Sheet. Fallback: divide EOY target proportionally.

fpu_trend._note: Separate alert: flag if FPU this week is >10% below last week, regardless of monthly status

cost_per_user._note: Separate budget alert: flag if actual cost/user exceeds plan by >30%

notification_cr._note: Notification click-rate %. Improved from 0.35% (Apr) to 0.48% (May 2026). Below baseline = flag.

google_sheets._note: Monthly KPI targets are read from here. Also read last month's actuals if available.

microsoft_365._note: Add email addresses of your manager and key partners to priority_senders

lark_api._note: Add your Lark group chat IDs to chat_ids. Store LARK_APP_ID and LARK_APP_SECRET via /agentbase-identity

telco_campaigns._note: Used for contextualizing KPI drop reasons in analysis

forecast._note: Agent reads past 3 months daily actuals from Google Sheets to build pacing curve. Falls back to linear with accuracy warning if unavailable.

_bau_note: Agent reads this sheet each morning to get the live SOP. The schedule below is the structured version for date-based flagging.

daily.detail: Track internal numbers at atlas.vng.com.vn — MPU, FPU, Cost/user, TikTok Shop
Set noti before 18:00 today for D+1. Schedule: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1EiCwwZ--U9dbwveHDf1Ro6JcFmyv6EKAPoup7uPr9Aw/edit

monday.detail: Hạnh auto-updates TTS perf every Monday. Check sheet & flag if numbers off track.
Email PIC (per plan email from start of month) to request MTD performance update.

monthly_by_date.timing: 15th of each month — send NEXT month's external plan
tasks: Send external plan to TikTok Shop: update Lark sheet + notify in group + send official email [External] Zalopay x PIPO TTS
Send external plan to Traveloka: create table and send email [Zalopay x Traveloka] Marketing Collaboration
Send external plan to FA for approval (sheet: FA Global Monthly Promotion Plan, sheets: Marketplace & Traveling)
monthly_by_date.sla_note: FA approval takes 3-4 days — send external plan first, add internal plan closer to 20th

monthly_by_date.timing: 20th of each month — lock internal plan + request data
tasks: Lock internal plan in FA sheet, send final approval email
Update internal Global sheet with finalized plan
Request data analysis for monthly report: email [Global Marketing] Phân tích user tháng M/YYYY
monthly_by_date.sla_note: Data request SLA 4 days — send from 20th, schedule pickup at EOM

monthly_by_date.timing: 25th–26th — register slots and request setups for next month
tasks: Register noti slots for next month (file: Noti schedule sheet)
Register Home Headers slots for next month
Register Social Media booking for next month
Register UGC for next month
Request design banners via Trello (SLA 3 days) — brief in GSlides, notify Bình after request
monthly_by_date.sla_note: Banner SLA 3 days — request from 25th at latest

tasks: Request user segments from ZDS: email [Global Marketing] Request lấy tập chạy CT tháng M+1
Update segment to CRM once ZDS exports
monthly_by_date.sla_note: Segment SLA 3 days — can send mid-month emergency requests too

tasks: Create new MKT codes for new campaigns (exclude renewals)
Send Ops setup requests via Jira + Confluence + notify Mai in Global group (SLA 3 days)
Request camp renewals via Jira: top-up budget + top-up rewards
Set up self-managed campaigns on CRM: budget approval, segments, vouchers
Set up ads request: prepare Onelink (Appsflyer), phone number list, materials
monthly_by_date.sla_note: All setup SLAs = 3 days. Ops requests must be sent by 27th latest.

tasks: Analyze full month M performance: MPU, FPU, TPV, cost/user vs target
Draft report with insights and plan for M+1
Schedule: send from 29th, finalize by EOM
